title: Your Brain Treats Tax Refunds Like Free Money
hook: You get $3,167 back from the IRS and spend 90% of it in a month — your brain's doing that on purpose.
angle: Mental accounting bias makes windfall money feel disposable while paychecks feel protected — same dollars, totally different fate
audience: Every working adult who gets a tax refund and wonders where it went
key_numbers: 5x more savings when received monthly vs lump sum
